notes: Group-coordinator routing, second attempt. Play/Pause/Next/Prev/GetPositionInfo now route to the group coordinator's IP instead of the paired speaker. Parser rewritten against real household ZoneGroupState XML captured from a live board (via v1.0.36's /api/zonestate diagnostic), verified across four scenarios (paired is coordinator, paired is a non-coord member of a multi-member group, paired is a different non-coord member, paired is not in any group) before ANY runtime change. Every parse failure branch returns pairedIP → guaranteed no regression from v1.0.35 behavior on any XML shape the parser doesn't recognize. Volume/bass/treble/mute unchanged — stay on paired speaker for per-room control.
